values.description: Pagrindinis JWT (US#19 ir US#112). US#112 atveju — vartotojo, kuris yra quest.assigned_to (R1, R2, R5). Auto-set per `npm run postman:setup:us112` arba `npm run postman:jwt -- email pwd`.
JWT kito grupes nario, kuris NEYRA quest.assigned_to. Naudojamas US#112 R3 testui (403 Forbidden). Auto-set per setup-us112.
Quest UUID R1 (rejected) testui — status=open, assigned_to=token user, initial_image_url=messy.
Quest UUID R2 (approved) testui — atskira quest, nes po sekmes pereina i completed.
